title: eriachne assimilis
intro: Eriachne assimilis, also known as the sickle grass or bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eriachne assimilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a poultice to treat wounds and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, Eriachne assimilis is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
